race.description: Qld Jewel Raceday QTIS 2YO Maiden Plate
race.comment: Tricky race to kick off the card with a few of these babies facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade SNIPER BOOM (1) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in both starts to date and strikes a winnable contest here. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. WRITTEN ACLAIM (2) performed above expectations when at the races for the first time and will have derived some experience from that hit-out. In the mix. THE AUTUMN AFFAIR (9) The Autumn Sun filly from Nailed It Nan on debut. Not far away in recent trial. Worth watching for any market moves. ANDER'S DREAM (3) Anders filly from Dream Finnish on debut. In the placings at her most recent trial and can make an impact here.
